description: Use this skill whenever someone wants to connect to an Itential platform and browse, inspect, or discover what's there — without starting a formal delivery. Trigger it for phrases like "connect to my platform", "show me what adapters are running", "authenticate and pull platform data", "I want to poke around before starting", "what workflows exist?", "give me an inventory of the platform", "browse capabilities freely", "check if adapter X is running", or "I just set up a new environment — show me what's there". Also use it for ad-hoc freestyle work where the user wants to build something directly without going through the full spec→design→build lifecycle.

results.query: connect to my platform and show me what adapters are running, what workflows exist, and what projects are available
browse my platform freely — i want to understand what tasks, adapters, and existing workflows are available before i commit to a design
log into my platform and pull all the available tasks for the ServiceNow adapter so i can see what we can use
i want to poke around my platform before starting any delivery — authenticate and show me what's there
can you authenticate to https://myplatform.itential.io and give me a summary of what's installed and running
check if the infoblox adapter is running and what tasks it exposes
i just spun up a new itential environment and want to know what i'm working with. connect and give me an inventory
i want to try a quick automation without writing a full spec. connect to my platform and let's just build it
pull the list of all workflows on my platform and tell me which ones look like they're related to device onboarding
freestyle exploration — connect to the platform and help me build something without going through the full delivery lifecycle
help me write requirements for a new VLAN provisioning use case. we have cisco switches and infoblox
solution design is approved — build all the components and run the tests
document all the global workflows on my platform and group them by use case
i have a project called Firewall_Rule_Lifecycle with no docs — reverse engineer it into a spec
the customer-spec.md is done. connect to the platform and check feasibility
my flowagent has been doing software upgrades in prod. convert it to a deterministic workflow
create a golden config tree for our cisco core routers with ISIS and BGP compliance rules
write the as-built documentation for the VLAN provisioning delivery
run the full delivery lifecycle for BGP peer provisioning — start with requirements
build an IAG python service that checks device reachability and returns pass/fail
